title: Python Classes and Methods
description: Practice defining a simple class with instance state.

choices: A local variable that disappears after __init__
An attribute on the current object
completionChecks.explanation: Assigning to self.name stores an attribute on that instance.

completionChecks.prompt: What does user.greet() return for User("Ada")?
completionChecks.explanation: The method reads self.name and formats it into the greeting.
